name: velocity_well_above_threshold_arms_when_not_armed
description: velocity comfortably exceeds threshold; currently_armed=False. This is the canonical 'arm' regime: parabolic squeeze fires for the first time. Pins the happy path.
derivation: velocity = current_return - prev_return = 5.0 - 2.0 = 3.0. should_arm = (velocity >= para_threshold) AND (not currently_armed) = (3.0 >= 0.5) AND (not False) = True AND True = True.
